summary: Made a surgical exit revision so Chapter 1 hands off cleanly into Chapter 2's overnight aftermath while preserving the Ezra-signature revelation and existing chapter beats.
edits: Extended the closing beat to show Thea leaving the question unasked after Cora's deflection.
Added Cora wiping a single hard oval in the front window to match the next chapter's opening image.
Added the pre-dawn pump sequence to bridge into Chapter 2's mention of Cora moving through the night.
